headline: Ryan Gallagher
image_alt_text: A social card featuring verified Hush Line user Ryan Gallagher, their bio, their tip line URL, and a QR code that links to the same URL.

social.bluesky:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Ryan is an investigative reporter for Bloomberg News covering cybersecurity, technology, crime, surveillance, and human rights.

Send Ryan a tip: https://tips.hushline.app/to/ryan
social.linkedin:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Ryan is an investigative reporter for Bloomberg News covering cybersecurity, technology, crime, surveillance, and human rights. He has more than a decade of experience working with whistleblowers and protecting sources.

To send Ryan a tip, go to https://tips.hushline.app/to/ryan.

subtext: I'm an investigative reporter for Bloomberg News covering cybersecurity, technology, crime, surveillance & human rights. I have more than a decade's experience working with whistleblowers to produce impactful journalism & I always protect my sources.
